# Claude Code 가이드북

> Slash Commands부터 MCP, Deployment/Admin, Agent SDK까지 — Claude Code의 주요 기능 영역을 단계별로 학습하는 가이드입니다.

## Modules

- [Slash Command](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/01-slash-commands)
  - [commit](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/01-slash-commands/commit)
  - [문서 리팩터링](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/01-slash-commands/doc-refactor)
  - [API 문서 생성기](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/01-slash-commands/generate-api-docs)
  - [코드 최적화](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/01-slash-commands/optimize)
  - [Pull Request 준비 체크리스트](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/01-slash-commands/pr)
  - [모두 커밋하고 푸시하기](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/01-slash-commands/push-all)
  - [CI/CD 파이프라인 설정](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/01-slash-commands/setup-ci-cd)
  - [단위 테스트 확장](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/01-slash-commands/unit-test-expand)
- [Memory 가이드](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/02-memory): Memory는 Claude가 세션과 대화 간에 컨텍스트를 유지할 수 있게 합니다. claude.ai에서는 자동 합성 형태로, Claude Code에서는 파일 시스템 기반 CLAUDE.md 형태로 존재합니다.
  - [API 모듈 표준](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/02-memory/directory-api-CLAUDE)
  - [나의 개발 설정](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/02-memory/personal-CLAUDE)
  - [프로젝트 구성](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/02-memory/project-CLAUDE)
- [에이전트 스킬 가이드](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/03-skills): 에이전트 스킬은 Claude의 기능을 확장하는 재사용 가능한 파일 시스템 기반 기능입니다. 도메인별 전문 지식, 워크플로, 모범 사례를 검색 가능한 컴포넌트로 패키징하여 Claude가 관련 상황에서 자동으로 사용합니다.
- [Subagent](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/04-subagents): Subagent는 Claude Code가 작업을 위임할 수 있는 전문화된 AI 어시스턴트입니다. 각 subagent는 특정 목적을 가지며, 메인 대화와 분리된 자체 컨텍스트 윈도우를 사용하고, 특정 도구와 커스텀 시스템 프롬프트로 구성할 수 있습니다.
  - [Clean Code Reviewer Agent](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/04-subagents/clean-code-reviewer)
  - [Code Reviewer Agent](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/04-subagents/code-reviewer)
  - [Data Scientist Agent](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/04-subagents/data-scientist)
  - [Debugger Agent](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/04-subagents/debugger)
  - [Documentation Writer Agent](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/04-subagents/documentation-writer)
  - [Implementation Agent](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/04-subagents/implementation-agent)
  - [Performance Optimizer Agent](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/04-subagents/performance-optimizer)
  - [Secure Code Reviewer](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/04-subagents/secure-reviewer)
  - [Test Engineer Agent](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/04-subagents/test-engineer)
- [MCP (Model Context Protocol)](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/05-mcp): 이 폴더에는 Claude Code에서 사용하는 MCP 서버 구성 및 사용법에 대한 포괄적인 문서와 예제가 포함되어 있습니다.
- [Hooks](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/06-hooks): Hooks는 Claude Code 세션 중 특정 이벤트에 반응하여 실행되는 자동화 스크립트입니다. 자동화, 검증, 권한 관리, 커스텀 워크플로우를 가능하게 합니다.
- [Claude Code Plugins](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/07-plugins): 이 폴더에는 여러 Claude Code 기능을 하나의 설치 가능한 패키지로 묶은 완전한 plugin 예제가 포함되어 있습니다.
- [Checkpoint과 Rewind](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/08-checkpoints): Checkpoint을 사용하면 대화 상태를 저장하고 Claude Code 세션의 이전 지점으로 rewind할 수 있습니다. 이 기능은 다양한 접근 방식을 탐색하거나, 실수를 복구하거나, 대안 솔루션을 비교할 때 매우 유용합니다.
  - [Checkpoint 예제](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/08-checkpoints/checkpoint-examples)
- [고급 기능](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/09-advanced-features): Plan mode, extended thinking, auto mode, background tasks, 권한 모드, print mode(비대화형), 세션 관리, 대화형 기능, channel, 음성 입력, remote control, 웹 세션, 데스크톱 앱, task list, 프롬프트 제안, git worktree, sandboxing, 관리형 설정, 그
  - [Channels Reference](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/09-advanced-features/channels-reference)
  - [Computer Use](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/09-advanced-features/computer-use)
  - [실행 모드](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/09-advanced-features/execution-modes)
  - [Fullscreen Rendering](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/09-advanced-features/fullscreen-rendering)
  - [Output Styles](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/09-advanced-features/output-styles)
  - [권한 & 보안](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/09-advanced-features/permissions-and-security)
  - [플래닝 모드 & 확장 사고](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/09-advanced-features/planning-and-thinking)
  - [Plan Mode 예제](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/09-advanced-features/planning-mode-examples)
  - [플랫폼 & 통합](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/09-advanced-features/platforms)
  - [세션 & 인터랙션](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/09-advanced-features/session-and-interaction)
  - [Settings System Guide](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/09-advanced-features/settings-system-guide)
  - [Slack의 Claude Code](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/09-advanced-features/slack)
  - [Terminal Configuration](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/09-advanced-features/terminal-configuration)
  - [Use Claude Code in VS Code](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/09-advanced-features/vscode)
- [CLI 참조](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/10-cli)
  - [오류 참고](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/10-cli/errors)
  - [도구 참고](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/10-cli/tools-reference)
  - [문제 해결](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/10-cli/troubleshooting)
- [Deployment Administration](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/11-deployment-admin): This module is the Korean counterpart for deployment administration topics, covering cloud provider setup, network boundaries, gateway patterns, identity, and usage controls.
  - [Amazon Bedrock](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/11-deployment-admin/amazon-bedrock)
  - [Authentication and IAM](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/11-deployment-admin/authentication-and-iam)
  - [Data Usage](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/11-deployment-admin/data-usage)
  - [Dev Container Setup](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/11-deployment-admin/devcontainer)
  - [Google Vertex AI](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/11-deployment-admin/google-vertex-ai)
  - [LLM Gateway](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/11-deployment-admin/llm-gateway)
  - [Microsoft Foundry](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/11-deployment-admin/microsoft-foundry)
  - [Monitoring and Usage](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/11-deployment-admin/monitoring-usage)
  - [Network Configuration](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/11-deployment-admin/network-config)
  - [Server-Managed Settings](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/11-deployment-admin/server-managed-settings)
  - [Zero Data Retention](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/11-deployment-admin/zero-data-retention)
- [Agent SDK](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk): This module mirrors the English Agent SDK reference set and keeps the same page structure for translation work.
  - [Agent Loop](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/agent-loop)
  - [Cost Tracking](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/cost-tracking)
  - [Custom Tools](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/custom-tools)
  - [File Checkpointing](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/file-checkpointing)
  - [Hooks](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/hooks)
  - [Hosting](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/hosting)
  - [MCP](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/mcp)
  - [Migration Guide](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/migration-guide)
  - [Modifying System Prompts](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/modifying-system-prompts)
  - [Observability](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/observability)
  - [Overview](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/overview)
  - [Permissions](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/permissions)
  - [Plugins](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/plugins)
  - [Python](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/python)
  - [Secure Deployment](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/secure-deployment)
  - [Sessions](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/sessions)
  - [Skills](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/skills)
  - [Slash Commands](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/slash-commands)
  - [Streaming Output](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/streaming-output)
  - [Streaming vs Single Mode](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/streaming-vs-single-mode)
  - [Structured Outputs](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/structured-outputs)
  - [Subagents](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/subagents)
  - [Todo Tracking](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/todo-tracking)
  - [Tool Search](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/tool-search)
  - [TypeScript v2 Preview](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/typescript-v2-preview)
  - [TypeScript](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/typescript)
  - [User Input](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main/modules/12-agent-sdk/user-input)

## Links

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide-book)
- [Full Site](https://github.com/HyunjunJeon/claude-code-guide/blob/main)
